title: 500 Golden Heart Stickers, Metallic Golden Self-Adhesive Waterproof Reflective Heart Stickers - Love Decorative Labels for Wedding, Valentine’s Day Supplies (1” Each)
features: Mega Bundle: It comes with 500pcs shiny metallic golden heart stickers in a roll, sufficient quantity to meet your various needs. The glittering surface and shimmering reflection create a stunning visual appeal. Each sticker measures about 1 inch.

Shiny Surface Design: The heart stickers feature a shining golden color, giving you a sparkle effect. The reflective surface make your stickers more beautiful and attractive, creating a stunning and eye-catching effect that instantly adds glamour to any project or surface.

High-Quality Materials: Crafted from premium materials, these glittering heart stickers are designed to be durable, long-lasting and removable with no residue They are waterproof, tear resistant and resistant to fading, allowing your creations to retain their sparkle.

Easy To Use: Simply peel off the backing and stick them onto any clean and dry surface. Their strong adhesive ensures a secure attachment, allowing the stickers to stay in place without worry. It is easy to peel off and stick on many flat surfaces, like plastic, paper, metal and so on. Peel off one and stick wherever you want, done!

Sparkling Decor: Suitable for Valentine's Day, wedding, birthday, decorating posters of your favorite musician, you can apply them to your cards, boxes, envelopes, notebooks, adding sweet touch to gifts, also can use them for DIY craft.
